item.title: INFRA: On-Device Aggregate Counters
item.intent: We must know if our AI features are landing without violating privacy — simple local counters tell us enough to make product decisions.
item.description: Per D-BIZ-6. Track simple aggregate counts in UserDefaults: AI improve uses, AI summarize uses, AI continue accepts, doctor fixes accepted, documents opened, days active. Never transmitted off device. Powers App Store review prompt timing (FEAT-069) and status bar stats. No PII, no content, no telemetry — just counts.
acceptanceCriteria: AI feature usage counts increment correctly and persist across launches
Counter data is stored in UserDefaults only — never transmitted
Counters are accessible for review prompt eligibility check (FEAT-069)
Deleting and reinstalling the app resets counters (no external storage)
